Pick up and use Seamlessly switch between single-ear and double-ear,12-hour-long battery life,Bluetooth 5.0.Incredibly simple to use, the Mi True Wireless Earbuds Basic 2 are ready to use as soon as you take them out of the charging case. Just put them in your ears and your audio experience awaits you.You need to manually connect the Mi True Wireless Earbuds Basic 2 to your phone the first time you use them, but there is no need to manually connect for subsequent use.Free and seamless switching between single-ear and double-ear,The Mi True Wireless Earbuds Basic 2 optimize the way the left and right,earphones are connected. With no restriction on primary and secondary devices, you can switch between single-ear and double-ear seamlessly.

Put in one earphone for mono sound and then put in the other to automatically resume stereo sound with no need to pair again.The Mi True Wireless Earbuds Basic 2 are equipped with the latest Bluetooth 5.0 chip, which has a data transmission speed two times faster than the previous generation as well as faster and more stable connections. XIAOMI Mibro Earbuds S1 TWS Earphones in Bangladesh

Mibro Earbuds S1 – TWS Touch Control Bluetooth Earphones. Comfortable wear and extraordinary design. Single earbud weighs 3.7g only. The half in-ear design makes it suitable for long time wearing.

Singlehanded sliding cover, no latency

Sliding cover type charging bay supports single- hand opening for efficient use.

Stable and continuous Bluetooth 5.3 chip

Bluetooth 5.3 empowers faster transmission and better stability.

ENC Call Noise Cancellation

Four high-performance microphones for both ears provide better yet proper call noise cancellation, helping you clearly hear others in all noisy occasions, including on the bus or subway.

Sweet stereo sound

13mm built-in speaker driving unit, 6u ultra-thin diaphragm and professional EQ tuning enable surging spatial stereo, bringing you a high-quality listening experience.

Long battery life for 35 hours

The earbud can be used for five hours (60% volume) once fully charged. The super-capacity charging bay can provide six times of 30-hour battery life for both earbuds, totaling 35 hours of ultra-long use.

Awei T13 Pro True Wireless Earbuds
description:
Awei T13 Pro True Wireless Earbuds in Bangladesh
The Awei T13 Pro True Wireless Earbuds, now available at TechLand BD, delivering an unparalleled audio experience in a compact and stylish design. With a frequency range of 2.402GHz~2.480GHz, these earbuds offer a clear and immersive sound quality, making every beat and note come to life. The 16Ω±15% impedance ensures optimal performance, while the 92dB±3dB sound level/sensitivity provides a balanced audio output. The earbuds boast an impressive battery life, with the charging box holding 300mAh and the earphones holding 50mAh, allowing for a 9-hour call time and 8 hours of playtime. Crafted from durable ABS+PC materials, these lightweight earbuds, weighing only 35g, guarantee comfort during prolonged use. The wireless connectivity with a transmission distance of 10m adds convenience to your audio experience. Packaged at just 74g, these earbuds are perfect for on-the-go lifestyles. The sleek black color adds a touch of sophistication to your tech collection. Although the Awei T13 Pro True Wireless Earbuds come with no warranty, their reliability and quality make them a must-have audio accessory. Elevate your listening moments with the Awei T13 Pro, now within your reach at TechLand BD.

description:
Earbuds

Wireless, Qi-certified

Playtime (when fully charged)

Playback with ANC ON: Up to 5 hours

Playback with ANC OFF: Up to 7 hours

Phone call Up to 3 hours (phone call)

Combined playback: Up to 28 hours (ANC ON), 38 hours (ANC OFF)

Warp charge

10 mins for 10 hours (charging case + earbuds combined)

Battery capacity

Per earbud: 40 mAh

Charging case: 520 mAh

Special Features
	

OnePlus Audio ID

Zen Mode Air

Weight
	

Weight Earbuds: 4.35 g

Charging case: 52 g

Dimensions
	

Dimensions Earbuds: 32mm*23.2mm

Charging case: 60.1mm*49mm*24.9mm

Warranty	6 Month

Sound Made Smart

Balance powerful sound with pure silence. Hybrid Active Noise Cancellation keeps you in control of your audio. Enjoy crystal-clear calls and a truly personal music listening experience. Powered by worry-free battery life, savor a symphony of powerful features for on-the-go studio-grade sound.

Smart Adaptive Noise Cancellation
Experience an oasis of silence with Hybrid Active Noise Cancellation. With peak noise cancelling at 40dB, the Buds Pro automatically adapts1 to your ambient sound environment. From your commute to your favorite coffee shop, immerse yourself in the deepest sounds. Just a pinch and hold away from Transparency Mode, you can focus on the music at home and stay aware when you’re on the road.
OnePlus Audio ID
Create a personalized hearing profile2 for a precisely tailored audio experience. Enjoy up to 10 meticulously sculpted sound signatures fine-tuned using a custom audio test. Hear and feel every note on your playlist.
Press play all day
Stay in charge with up to 38 hours5 of immersive audio. Whether you’re on-the-go or taking it slow. Thanks to incredible battery life, you can press play all day.
Welcome to Warp Charge
Break the sound barrier. Charge for 10 minutes, listen for 10 hours8. The case can even be charged wirelessly with Qi-certified chargers9. When it comes to fast charging, the OnePlus Buds Pro score ten for ten.
Crafted to perfection
The Buds Pro come in two iconic colorways, Matte Black and Glossy White – and look just as good on a run as they do in the office. The matte surface of the buds combines a superior tactile experience with enhanced sweat and dust protection. The chrome stalk blends contemporary class with head-turning aesthetics for even more flair. A state-of-the-art NCL laser coating process delivers a luxuriously smooth luster, accentuating the pressure-sensitive controls with clearly audible feedback. With a design language that speaks to you, hearing is believing.
All-go in all-weather
Rated IP55 for water and sweat-resistance, the OnePlus Buds Pro are perfect for outdoors and the gym. Together with the take-anywhere IPX4-rated13 charging case, stay fit with the perfect fit.
Heavy on the comfort
The organically curved, perfectly weighted design and precision seals deliver enhanced ergonomic comfort for hours of listening pleasure. With 3 silicone tip sizes available, finding your first-class fit is effortless

Dimensions
	

Dimensions Earbuds: 33mm * 2244mm * 21.8 mm

Charging case: 73.15mm * 36.80mm * 29.07mm

Warranty	6 Month

OnePlus Buds Z2 Earbuds

The OnePlus Buds Z2 Earbuds. These OnePlus Buds Z2 Earbuds come with active noise cancelation, Dolby Atmos support and are rated at 38 hours of battery life including the case and without ANC turned on.OnePlus Buds Z2 Earbuds pack 11mm dynamic drivers and pair over Bluetooth 5.2. They come with support for the AAC and SBC Bluetooth codecs and the BLE, SPP, HFP, A2DP and AVRCP Bluetooth transmission protocols.the OnePlus Buds Z2 Earbuds is claimed to block out up to 40db of outside noises with the aid of three microphones on each earbud. OnePlus Buds Z2 Earbuds are IP55 splash-proof while the case is IPX4 splash resistant. Each bud packs up to 7 hours of autonomous use with ANC off and 5 hours with ANC on. Warp charge is supported here and can give you 5 hours of listening from a 10-minute charge.OnePlus Buds Z2 Earbuds will be the 3 microphones used for active noise reduction and an improved design that handles wind better.The OnePlus Buds Z2 Earbuds case itself charges over USB-C, of course, but doesn’t support wireless charging. Each bud weighs just 4.6g while the box goes up to 42g depending on the color, which is either Night Black or Day White.

Each bud weighs just 4.6g while the box goes up to 42g depending on the color, which is either Night Black or Day White.

Sound Made Smart

Balance powerful sound with pure silence. Hybrid Active Noise Cancellation keeps you in control of your audio. Enjoy crystal-clear calls and a truly personal music listening experience. Powered by worry-free battery life, savor a symphony of powerful features for on-the-go studio-grade sound.

Smart Adaptive Noise Cancellation

Experience an oasis of silence with Hybrid Active Noise Cancellation. With peak noise canceling at 40dB, the Buds Pro automatically adapts1 to your ambient sound environment. From your commute to your favorite coffee shop, immerse yourself in the deepest sounds. Just a pinch and hold away from Transparency Mode, you can focus on the music at home and stay aware when you’re on the road.

OnePlus Audio ID

Create a personalized hearing profile2 for a precisely tailored audio experience. Enjoy up to 10 meticulously sculpted sound signatures fine-tuned using a custom audio test. Hear and feel every note on your playlist.

Press play all-day

Stay in charge with up to 38 hours5 of immersive audio. Whether you’re on the go or taking it slow. Thanks to incredible battery life, you can press play all day.

Welcome to Warp Charge

Break the sound barrier. Charge for 10 minutes, listen for 10 hours8. The case can even be charged wirelessly with Qi-certified chargers9. When it comes to fast charging, the OnePlus Buds Pro score ten for ten.

Crafted to perfection

The Buds Pro come in two iconic colorways, Matte Black and Glossy White – and look just as good on a run as they do in the office. The matte surface of the buds combines a superior tactile experience with enhanced sweat and dust protection. The chrome stalk blends contemporary class with head-turning aesthetics for even more flair. A state-of-the-art NCL laser coating process delivers a luxuriously smooth luster, accentuating the pressure-sensitive controls with clearly audible feedback. With a design language that speaks to you, hearing is believing.

All-go in all-weather

Rated IP55 for water and sweat resistance, the OnePlus Buds Pro is perfect for outdoors and at the gym. Together with the take-anywhere IPX4-rated13 charging case, stay fit with the perfect fit.

Heavy on the comfort

The organically curved, perfectly weighted design and precision seals deliver enhanced ergonomic comfort for hours of listening pleasure. With 3 silicone tip sizes available, finding your first-class fit is effortless
